events.text: Substitution, Congo DR. Noah Sadiki replaces Ngal'ayel Mukau.
Jhon Lucumí (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Congo DR. Simon Banza replaces Cédric Bakambu.
Substitution, Colombia. Jhon Córdoba replaces Luis Suárez.
Substitution, Colombia. Juan Fernando Quintero replaces James Rodríguez.
Substitution, Congo DR. Joris Kayembe replaces Arthur Masuaku.
Substitution, Congo DR. Charles Pickel replaces Edo Kayembe.
Goal! Colombia 1, Congo DR 0. Daniel Muñoz (Colombia) left footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Juan Fernando Quintero.
Substitution, Colombia. Richard Ríos replaces Jhon Arias.
Substitution, Congo DR. Nathanaël Mbuku replaces Samuel Moutoussamy.
Charles Pickel (Congo DR) is shown the yellow card.
Jefferson Lerma (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
